daughter.title: Turtle Blues
daughter.shipping: Contact for shipping quote — large sculptural piece
daughter.description: A large-scale sea turtle rendered in deep slate blues and silver, with tribal and Celtic-inspired engravings across every inch of the shell. The kind of piece that stops people mid-conversation. Hand-sculpted paper mache by Kindness Grace. Original. Breathtaking.

daughter.title: Dinner?
daughter.shipping: Ships via USPS Priority, $18 flat rate
daughter.description: Bold, joyful, and impossible to walk past. This terracotta-toned crab sculpture by Kindness Grace arrives with attitude and a name that says everything. Original hand-sculpted paper mache. One of a kind.

daughter.title: Sea Leopard
daughter.shipping: Contact for shipping quote — large sculptural piece
daughter.description: An octopus of mythic proportions. Deep teal and forest green with iridescent lavender suckers that shimmer when the light catches them. Tentacles reaching in every direction. This is not wall art — this is a statement. Hand-sculpted paper mache by Kindness Grace. Original. Unmistakable.
daughter.medium: Sculpted paper mache, acrylic paint, iridescent accents

daughter.title: Dilophosaurus
daughter.description: You remember the moment. The frill opened. The sound. Jurassic Park, 1993. This Dilophosaurus bust by Kindness Grace captures that exact confrontational energy — volcanic yellows and reds radiating through the frill, teeth bared, eyes locked on yours. Hand-sculpted paper mache. The most talked-about piece in any room it enters.

daughter.title: Mariposa
daughter.shipping: Ships in custom box, $22 flat rate
daughter.description: A monarch butterfly in full glory, wings spread wide over a yellow flower — mounted in a black shadow box.
daughter.medium: Sculpted paper mache, acrylic paint, shadow box

daughter.title: Little Ladys
daughter.shipping: Ships via USPS Priority, $14 flat rate
daughter.description: Two cheerful ladybugs resting on a periwinkle blue flower, trimmed with white dot details.

daughter.title: Canned Tuna
daughter.shipping: Contact for shipping quote — very large piece
daughter.description: A life-size tuna built from hundreds of individual spoon-shaped scales, creating a shimmering metallic surface unlike anything else.
daughter.medium: Sculpted paper mache, metallic paint, mixed media scales

daughter.title: Mothra
daughter.shipping: Ships in flat box, $18 flat rate
daughter.description: Inspired by the iconic Kaiju moth, this piece explodes with fiery yellows, oranges, and reds against a dramatic dark body.

daughter.title: Phoenix Rising
daughter.description: A sculptural phoenix in full wingspan, mounted within a gilded ornate frame — the bird breaking free of the canvas itself.
daughter.medium: Sculpted paper mache, acrylic paint, antique gilded frame

daughter.title: Turtle Journey
daughter.shipping: Contact for shipping quote — framed piece
daughter.description: A green sea turtle swimming through cracked, flowing water — rendered in a panoramic framed scene with natural river stones.
daughter.medium: Sculpted paper mache, acrylic paint, antique frame, natural stones

clothing.title: The Terracotta Bralette
clothing.description: Summer festival. Your favorite vendor. The one with the handmade things you could never quite find anywhere else. This terracotta crochet bralette is the piece you would have bought that day and kept forever. Tie back. Fringe detail. Handmade with the kind of care that shows.

scenes.title: The Studio Corner
scenes.description: An eclectic array designed to get your creativity loosed and elicit gasps from those who enter.

items.name: Yellow Rocker
items.desc: A treat for your seat. Classy, one-of-a-kind find.

items.name: Dilophosauras
items.desc: A replica of the best jump scare beast from Jurassic Park.

items.name: Fisher Price Record Player
items.desc: It's not just for kids, I swear. One of the coolest ads you could introduce to your home.

items.name: Phone Table
items.desc: Yes, I KNOW we don't use these kind of phones anymore, BUT guess what?! You can kinda use this for anything. Like here, we have a cool record player on it.
